name: Red dot
svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 512 512"><rect width="512" height="512" fill="#ffffff"/><circle cx="256" cy="256" r="150" fill="#e23d3d"/></svg>

name: Circle and square
svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 512 512"><rect width="512" height="512" fill="#ffffff"/><circle cx="160" cy="256" r="100" fill="#e23d3d"/><rect x="262" y="156" width="200" height="200" fill="#2d6cdf"/></svg>

name: Dot in a box
svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 512 512"><rect width="512" height="512" fill="#ffffff"/><rect x="106" y="106" width="300" height="300" fill="#2d6cdf"/><circle cx="256" cy="256" r="90" fill="#e23d3d"/></svg>

name: RGB overlap
svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 512 512"><rect width="512" height="512" fill="#ffffff"/><circle cx="200" cy="220" r="120" fill="#e23d3d" fill-opacity="0.75"/><circle cx="312" cy="220" r="120" fill="#3bb273" fill-opacity="0.75"/><circle cx="256" cy="316" r="120" fill="#2d6cdf" fill-opacity="0.75"/></svg>

name: Yellow triangle
svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 512 512"><rect width="512" height="512" fill="#ffffff"/><polygon points="256,90 432,420 80,420" fill="#f2c81f"/></svg>
